cases.title: RbacNegativeMatrix: PermissionGuard denies out-of-scope report:read before ReportService executes against Postgres
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with ClassAssignment linking Instructor A to HESD-01 / SWE-101 only
Attendance and Closed session data exist for HESD-01/SWE-101 and HESD-02/SWE-102
PermissionGuard wired to roles-permissions matrix per testing-plan §5 RbacNegativeMatrix
steps: Authenticate as Instructor A and invoke GET /reports/summary for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102
Assert PermissionGuard returns 403 before ReportService query executes (spy or query counter)
Assert no student roster rows from HESD-02 appear in response body
Repeat for GET /reports/session/:sessionId where session belongs to unassigned class-subject
Assert 100% denial rate for out-of-scope report:read attempts in matrix sample
cases.expected: NFR-11 module boundary: out-of-scope report access denied at permission guard with real DB; ReportService never returns cross-assignment data per BR-08

cases.title: Denied CSV export attempt by Instructor writes security audit record per BR-09
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with attendance data and authenticated Instructor session
Instructor role lacks report:export per roles-permissions §2.2
ExportAuditLog or security log table available for denied attempts
steps: POST /reports/export with valid filter body using Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 and errorCode ExportNotAllowed
Query export_audit_logs or security log and assert denied attempt recorded with actor userId, timestamp, and action detail
Assert no CSV file content generated and no success export audit row created
cases.expected: NFR-11 target: 100% out-of-scope export denied with audit log per BR-09; message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu

cases.title: Instructor attendance:write blocked after 24-hour edit window with EditWindowExpired
preconditions: Closed session with closedAt at T0 in Postgres
TestClock fixture controls current time
Instructor assigned to session with attendance:write during Active window
steps: At T0 + 23h invoke PATCH /attendance/:recordId with Instructor session and assert HTTP 200
Advance clock to T0 + 25h
Invoke PATCH /attendance/:recordId with same Instructor session and valid status change
Assert HTTP status 403 and errorCode EditWindowExpired
Query attendance_records and confirm status unchanged from last successful edit
cases.expected: beforeState: instructor edit allowed within 24h; afterState: instructor attendance:write denied per NFR-11 manual edit authorization; HTTP 403 EditWindowExpired

cases.title: TS-31: Assigned instructor report succeeds; unassigned instructor report denied per RBAC matrix
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101; Instructor B not assigned
Closed sessions with attendance exist for HESD-01 / SWE-101
Both instructors authenticated with valid sessions
steps: Instructor A GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 and assert HTTP 200 with roster data
Instructor B GET same URL and assert HTTP 403 ReportAccessDenied
Assert Instructor B response contains no student roster or summary counts
Verify denial message Bạn không có quyền xem báo cáo này per roles-permissions §2.5
cases.expected: NFR-11 scenario-matrix TS-31: scoped report access enforced; assigned 200, unassigned 403 with zero data leakage per AC-12b and BR-08

cases.title: TS-32: Non-admin CSV export rejected; TrainingOfficeAdmin export succeeds
preconditions: Attendance data exists for export filter parameters
Authenticated Instructor and Student sessions
Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with report:export
steps: Instructor POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body and assert HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed
Student POST /api/v1/reports/export with same body and assert HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed
TrainingOfficeAdmin POST /api/v1/reports/export with same body and assert HTTP 200 text/csv
Query export_audit_logs and confirm success audit for admin export and denied attempt log for instructor per BR-09
cases.expected: NFR-11 scenario-matrix TS-32: 100% non-admin export denial; admin-only report:export per AC-13 and BR-09

cases.title: TS-09: Instructor views unassigned class roster returns 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Instructor assigned to HESD-01 only; enrollments exist for HESD-01 and HESD-02
Authenticated Instructor session without roster:read for HESD-02 class-subject
steps: GET /api/v1/enrollments?classId=<HESD-01-id>&subjectId=<SWE-101-id> with Instructor session and assert HTTP 200
GET /api/v1/enrollments?classId=<HESD-02-id>&subjectId=<SWE-102-id> with same session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Assert response body contains no enrollment rows for unassigned class-subject
cases.expected: NFR-11 cross-class data protection: instructor denied unassigned roster per TS-09; no peer class enrollment data exposed

cases.title: GET /reports/summary by unassigned instructor returns 403 ReportAccessDenied error envelope
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor B not assigned to requested class-subject
Attendance data exists for HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 with Instructor B session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response JSON contains errorCode ReportAccessDenied, message Bạn không có quyền xem báo cáo này, and requestId
Assert response body contains no classCode aggregation or students array with data
cases.expected: HTTP 403 standard error envelope per API design and roles-permissions §2.5; no report payload for out-of-scope instructor

cases.title: POST /reports/export by Instructor returns 403 ExportNotAllowed error envelope
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session
Valid export filter body matching API design §8.3
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with JSON filter body using Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response JSON contains errorCode ExportNotAllowed and message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu
Assert Content-Type is application/json not text/csv
cases.expected: HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed contract per roles-permissions §2.5; CSV export blocked for non-admin per BR-09

cases.title: GET /reports/summary by Student returns 403 Forbidden — students never receive report:read
preconditions: Authenticated Student session with enrollment history
Attendance report data exists for student's enrolled class-subject
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 with Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId for enrolled session with Student session and assert HTTP 403
Assert no cohort aggregate or peer student data in either response body
cases.expected: NFR-11: Student role denied report:read per roles-permissions §2.2; personal history uses GET /attendance/me/history only per FR-14

cases.title: Student denied user:write on POST /users and GET /users list
preconditions: Authenticated Student session
Valid user create payload prepared per API design
steps: POST /api/v1/users with valid JSON body using Student session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
GET /api/v1/users with Student session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
Query users table and confirm no new row from Student create attempt
cases.expected: NFR-11 rbac-negative: Student lacks user:write and user:read (all); admin-only user admin per roles-permissions §2.3

cases.title: Instructor denied roster:write and report:export admin-only endpoints
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session assigned to at least one class-subject
Valid CSV roster import and export filter payloads prepared
steps: POST /api/v1/roster/import with valid CSV multipart using Instructor session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter using Instructor session and assert HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed
GET /api/v1/audit/logs or audit:read endpoint with Instructor session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
cases.expected: NFR-11 rbac-negative matrix: Instructor denied roster:write, report:export, and audit:read per roles-permissions §2.2 empty cells

cases.title: Student denied session management and qr:display permissions
preconditions: Authenticated Student session
Active session with valid QR token exists in database
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions with valid create body using Student session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open using Student session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current using Student session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
cases.expected: NFR-11: Student has no session:write, session:read (scoped), or qr:display; all session management denied per roles-permissions §2.2

cases.title: Student denied access to another student's attendance record via scoped API
preconditions: Student A and Student B enrolled in same class-subject with distinct attendance records
Authenticated Student A session
steps: Student A attempts GET /api/v1/attendance/:studentBRecordId or equivalent cross-user attendance endpoint
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden or empty self-scoped result with no peer data
Student A GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history and assert only own records returned
Assert no institutionalId or displayName from Student B appears in Student A response
cases.expected: NFR-11 cross-class/peer data protection: Student attendance:read limited to self per AC-14b and roles-permissions §1.3 Self scope

cases.title: Flow D reporting authorization: assigned 200, unassigned 403, non-admin export 403, admin export 200
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101; Instructor B unassigned
TrainingOfficeAdmin account exists
Closed sessions with attendance for HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: Instructor A GET /api/v1/reports/summary for assigned class-subject and assert HTTP 200 with data
Instructor A GET /api/v1/reports/summary for unassigned class and assert HTTP 403 ReportAccessDenied
Instructor A POST /api/v1/reports/export and assert HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed
TrainingOfficeAdmin POST /api/v1/reports/export with same filters and assert HTTP 200 CSV with export audit log
cases.expected: NFR-11 Flow D complete: report scope and export authorization enforced end-to-end per testing-plan §6 Flow D and AC-12/AC-13

cases.title: Instructor manual edit at 25h post-close returns 403 EditWindowExpired; admin override succeeds
preconditions: Closed session with closedAt at T0; attendance record in Absent status
Instructor assigned to session; TrainingOfficeAdmin account available
TestClock at T0 + 25h
steps: Instructor PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId to Present and assert HTTP 403 EditWindowExpired
Assert message Đã quá thời hạn chỉnh sửa điểm danh (24 giờ) per error-handling §3.1
TrainingOfficeAdmin PATCH same record to Present and assert HTTP 200
Query AttendanceAuditLog and confirm admin edit recorded with actor and timestamps
cases.expected: NFR-11 boundary: instructor attendance:write time window enforced; admin post-24h override allowed per BR-10 and roles-permissions §2.3

cases.title: Repeated denied export attempts by Student each return 403 and produce audit entries
preconditions: Authenticated Student session
Attendance data exists for export filters
steps: Student POST /api/v1/reports/export attempt 1 and assert HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed
Student POST /api/v1/reports/export attempt 2 with different filter and assert HTTP 403
Query security or export audit log and assert two denied attempt records with distinct timestamps and actor Student userId
Assert no CSV content returned on either attempt
cases.expected: NFR-11 100% denial target: every out-of-scope export attempt rejected with audit log per BR-09 and NFR-11 verification criteria

cases.title: Instructor UI hides export controls and shows ForbiddenPage on admin-only report routes
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session in browser
Instructor layout renders report navigation per UI page list
Admin export route /admin/export exists but is not in instructor nav
steps: Navigate to instructor-scoped report page for assigned class-subject and verify report table renders
Verify CSV export button or link is not visible in instructor report view
Navigate directly to /admin/export or /admin/reports/export URL as Instructor
Observe ForbiddenPage or redirect with message Bạn không có quyền thực hiện thao tác này; no export form rendered
cases.expected: NFR-11 browser RBAC: UI route guard mirrors API report:export denial; instructor cannot access admin export surface per roles-permissions §2.4

cases.title: Student UI hides admin navigation and blocks direct admin user list URL
preconditions: Authenticated Student session in browser
Admin user management route /admin/users exists
steps: Open student home or check-in layout and verify admin Users or Reports nav entries are absent
Navigate directly to /admin/users URL as Student
Observe ForbiddenPage or login redirect with 403-equivalent UX; user list table not rendered
Verify no user roster data visible in DOM
cases.expected: NFR-11 browser journey: Student denied user:read (all) and user:write; admin routes blocked by UI guard matching API RBAC

cases.title: Admin CSV export confirm dialog succeeds; instructor export modal shows denial message on 403
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated with report data visible on admin reports page
Instructor authenticated on equivalent report view if accessible
steps: As TrainingOfficeAdmin open CSV export confirm dialog, submit export, and verify file download or success toast
Log out and authenticate as Instructor
If export action reachable via devtools or stale UI, trigger export and observe modal with message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu per error-handling §6 UI mapping
Verify no CSV download initiated for Instructor
cases.expected: NFR-11 UI enforcement: admin export permitted; non-admin export blocked with localized BR-09 message per CsvExportConfirmForm traceability

cases.title: RbacNegativeMatrix integration sweep: each role denied all empty-matrix permission endpoints
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with seeded fixtures for sessions, reports, and users
Test matrix enumerates denied (role, permission, route) tuples from roles-permissions §2.2
Authenticated sessions for Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin
steps: For Student role, call each endpoint requiring permissions denied in §2.2 (session:write, report:read, report:export, user:write, roster:write, policy:write, audit:read) and assert HTTP 403
For Instructor role, call denied endpoints (report:export, user:write, roster:write, policy:write, audit:read, checkin:submit) and assert HTTP 403
For TrainingOfficeAdmin, call denied endpoints (checkin:submit, qr:display) and assert HTTP 403
Compute denial rate across full matrix sample and assert equals 100%
cases.expected: NFR-11 verification criterion met: RBAC negative test matrix per role denies 100% of out-of-scope access attempts per testing-plan §5 RbacNegativeMatrix
